title: EGLO Recessed Light, Aluminium, GU10, White
features: The round recessed spotlight made of cast aluminium in white can be swivelled and blends seamlessly into the modern trend
Thanks to the flat design and the timeless design, the spot can be used in any room – whether in the kitchen, living room, dining room, hallway or bedroom
The energy-saving LED light bulb is included and provides pleasantly warm white light (5 watts, 400 lumens)
Suitable for any bulb with GU10 socket, maximum 5 watts per socket. Dimmable depending on the bulb used
Dimensions: installation depth: 11.5 cm, diameter: 8 cm, cut-out: 6.8 cm

This product is a containing product. Containing products are luminaires that can be disassembled for a separate check of the light source(s) they contain. This product contains a light source of energy efficiency class f
description: From the manufacturer "Contemporary design paired with high functionality at affordable prices" is our motto. The heart of the global EGLO Group is the company headquarters in Pill,Tyrol. With around 90 branches on five continents, we are one of the leading companies in the residential lighting market. We have our finger on the pulse, allowing for the development and production of products that are tailored to the needs of our customers. Large selection: Last year alone, over 900 new products were developed and our current product range consists of around 4.000 articles. Every day, we produce 80,000 new products that find their way to our customers worldwide. Quality and design: We set high standards for the quality of our products and services. That is why all development and production steps - from the product idea through the design phase to series production - are carried out from this perspective. At EGLO, we have found a place in light history that has allowed us to successfully grow for the last 50 years.
